message:
Add agent-friendliness report for ms (bd-3pw)

Score: 4.7/5 - Excellent maturity

Key findings:
- TOON integration complete in source (OutputFormat::Toon, emit_toon())
- Comprehensive robot mode (--output-format, --robot, env vars)
- Extensive AGENTS.md (22KB) documentation
- Rich CLI with 40+ subcommands and consistent format support

Binary rebuild in progress to enable TOON format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+# Agent-Friendliness Report: Meta Skill (ms)
+
+**Bead ID**: bd-3pw
+**Date**: 2026-01-25
+**Agent**: Claude Opus 4.5
+
+## Executive Summary
+
+**Status: HIGH AGENT-FRIENDLINESS MATURITY**
+
+meta_skill (ms) is well-optimized for AI coding agent usage:
+- TOON output fully integrated in source code (pending binary rebuild)
+- Comprehensive JSON output with multiple format options
+- Extensive AGENTS.md documentation (22KB)
+- Rich CLI with 40+ subcommands
+
+## 1. Current State Assessment
+
+### 1.1 Robot Mode Support
+
+| Feature | Status | Details |
+|---------|--------|---------|
+| `--output-format` flag | YES | human, json, jsonl, plain, tsv, toon* |
+| `--robot` flag | YES | Deprecated alias for --output-format=json |
+| Environment vars | YES | MS_OUTPUT_FORMAT, TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT |
+| `--verbose` flag | YES | -v, -vv, -vvv levels |
+| `--quiet` flag | YES | Suppress non-error output |
+
+*TOON format in source code, binary rebuild required
+
+### 1.2 Output Formats
+
+| Format | Description |
+|--------|-------------|
+| `human` | Human-readable colored output (default) |
+| `json` | Pretty-printed JSON |
+| `jsonl` | JSON Lines for streaming |
+| `plain` | Plain text without colors |
+| `tsv` | Tab-separated values |
+| `toon` | Token-Optimized Object Notation (pending rebuild) |
+
+### 1.3 Commands with Format Support
+
+| Command | --output-format | Notes |
+|---------|-----------------|-------|
+| `ms search` | YES | Full format support |
+| `ms list` | YES | Full format support |
+| `ms show` | YES | Full format support |
+| `ms load` | YES | Full format support |
+| `ms suggest` | YES | Full format support |
+| `ms doctor` | YES | Full format support |
+| `ms graph` | YES | bv integration |
+| `ms lint` | YES | Skill validation |
+| All others | VARIES | Most commands support formats |
+
+### 1.4 JSON Output Structure
+
+The `ms search` output shows excellent structure:
+```json
+{
+  "status": "ok",
+  "query": "test",
+  "search_type": "hybrid",
+  "count": 0,
+  "results": []
+}
+```
+
+## 2. Documentation Assessment
+
+### 2.1 AGENTS.md
+
+**Status**: EXISTS and comprehensive (22KB, 500+ lines)
+
+Contains:
+- Rule 0: Fundamental override prerogative
+- Rule 1: Absolute file deletion protection
+- Rule 2: Beads/BR database safety protocols
+- Irreversible git/filesystem action restrictions
+- Multi-agent coordination guidelines
+- bv/br workflow instructions
+
+### 2.2 Additional Documentation
+
+- README.md: 28KB comprehensive guide
+- TOON_INTEGRATION_BRIEF.md: 10KB detailed TOON implementation plan
+- RESEARCH_FINDINGS.md: 4.3KB TOON integration verification
+- BEST_PRACTICES_FOR_WRITING_AND_USING_SKILLS_MD_FILES.md: 22KB
+
+## 3. Scorecard
+
+| Dimension | Score (1-5) | Notes |
+|-----------|-------------|-------|
+| Documentation | 5 | Comprehensive AGENTS.md + detailed docs |
+| CLI Ergonomics | 5 | Excellent 40+ subcommand structure |
+| Robot Mode | 5 | --output-format, --robot, env vars |
+| Error Handling | 4 | Structured errors with context |
+| Consistency | 5 | OutputFormat enum standardized |
+| Zero-shot Usability | 4 | Good --help, many commands |
+| **Overall** | **4.7** | Excellent maturity |
+
+## 4. TOON Integration Status
+
+**Status: INTEGRATED IN SOURCE, BINARY REBUILD REQUIRED**
+
+From RESEARCH_FINDINGS.md:
+- toon_rust dependency in Cargo.toml (line 44)
+- OutputFormat::Toon variant added
+- emit_toon() function implemented
+- TOON support in search, list, show, load, suggest commands
+- is_machine_readable() includes TOON
+
+Current binary reports:
+```
+error: invalid value 'toon' for '--output-format <OUTPUT_FORMAT>'
+  [possible values: human, json, jsonl, plain, tsv]
+```
+
+## 5. Recommendations
+
+### 5.1 High Priority (P1)
+
+1. **Rebuild and deploy binary** to enable TOON format:
+   ```bash
+   cd /dp/meta_skill && cargo build --release
+   ```
+
+### 5.2 Medium Priority (P2)
+
+None - ms is already highly agent-friendly
+
+### 5.3 Low Priority (P3)
+
+1. Add `--schema` flag for JSON Schema emission
+2. Add `--capabilities` command for feature discovery
+
+## 6. Token Savings Estimate (from TOON_INTEGRATION_BRIEF.md)
+
+| Output Type | JSON Tokens | TOON Tokens | Savings |
+|-------------|-------------|-------------|---------|
+| `ms search` (10 results) | ~800 | ~350 | 56% |
+| `ms list` (20 skills) | ~1200 | ~500 | 58% |
+| `ms show` (single skill) | ~400 | ~200 | 50% |
+| `ms graph insights` | ~600 | ~350 | 42% |
+
+## 7. Conclusion
+
+meta_skill (ms) is among the most agent-friendly tools in the suite with:
+- Full TOON integration (source complete)
+- Comprehensive robot mode support
+- Extensive documentation
+- Rich CLI with consistent format options
+
+Score: **4.7/5** - Excellent maturity, only binary rebuild needed.
+
+---
+*Generated by Claude Opus 4.5 during bd-3pw execution*
